content.en:
this day.

Linggu Capital, a mysterious palace, the six Immortal Peerless Ultimate Realm Lords of Linggu Capital all gathered here.

Ancient dust is extremely respectful!

Linglong is extremely honorable!

Ice Law is extremely honorable!

Yan Yu is extremely honorable!

Deep Bone Extreme!

Yonghe is extremely honorable!

These six Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters are the true Dinghai Divine Needles of the Linggu Capital, and they are also the ones in charge.

But at this moment, the six Immortal-level powerhouses had heavy faces and were discussing a big matter.

Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable said, "Everyone, the ultimate calamity is coming, how should we deal with it this time?"

At the mention of the Ultimate Tribulation, the other five Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters were all worried.

"Did the Ultimate Extremities pass down any will?"

Yonghe Jizun asked.

"No!" Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable shook his head, "The Ultimate Extreme Venerable is extremely free, they can enter and leave the Ultimate Land freely, and the Ultimate Tribulation will not affect them, they will not care about the Ultimate Tribulation." Besides, the Ultimate Tribulation is good for the Ultimate Land, how can the Ultimate Extremities stop it? Unless we are the family members of the Ultimate Extremities, we will be protected by the Ultimate Extremities.787 We don't care about the Ultimate Tribulation. "

"Then you can only sacrifice countless living beings, as long as the Ultimate Land absorbs enough life energy to make the Ultimate Land function normally, the Ultimate Tribulation will be stopped. But at least half of the Ultimate Realm Masters in the Spirit Ancient Capital have to die!"

"We also have to try not to go out, otherwise we also have the hope of falling, dying an eternal level, comparable to falling hundreds of ancient levels, the ultimate place is staring at us these eternal levels, it wants to devour us the most!"

"Well, after all, the Spirit Ancient Capital is the birthplace of an Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and there is still some luck, and other Immortal Level Existences will not destroy this place. "

"It's still according to the old rules, join forces with some other ancient-level existences among the forces to open a treasure land, let a group of ancient-level and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lords kill, and open the first batch of death lists for the Ultimate Tribulation. Otherwise, it will be extremely cruel to wait for the ultimate catastrophe to be actively opened. "

"Well, yes, but which treasure land to open?"

They thought about it for a long time, and discussed it with the ancient powerhouses of other forces, and finally decided to open the ultimate demon prison.

The Ultimate Hell is a very precious treasure land, which not only contains all kinds of primitive ultimate breaths, but also contains materials that can be used to craft ultimate weapons, and even several good places to assist in understanding the ultimate rules.

Of course, there is also a problem with the Ultimate Hell, that is, there is an Ultimate Hell, which will disturb the will of the Ultimate Realm Lords, and if they stay for too long, they will gradually be transformed by the Ultimate Demon and completely trapped there.

Since these countless Ultimate Eras, there have been quite a few Ultimate Realm Masters who have been demonized by the Ultimate Hell, and those Ultimate Realm Masters who have been demonized by the Ultimate Hells are called Ultimate Demon Disciples.

When you enter the Ultimate Hell, you will encounter the Ultimate Devil, which is also one of the dangers.

Once the Ultimate Demon Hell, there will definitely be a lot of Ultimate Realm Lords who will die, and after these Ultimate Realm Lords die, they will be swallowed by the Ultimate Land, which can alleviate a little Ultimate Tribulation at that time.

"Then let's open the ultimate hell!"

These Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords decided.

......

Soon, a piece of news spread in the Linggu Capital.

"The Ultimate Hell is about to begin!"

Ye Tian didn't know what the Ultimate Demon Hell was at first, but after a little understanding, he knew the situation of the Ultimate Demon Prison.

This is an incomparably cruel place, but there are also many opportunities, every time there are many high-level breakthroughs to the ancient level, and there are also ancient levels that have obtained great opportunities and broken through to the existence of the ancient level in one fell swoop.

However, more Ultimate Realm Lords have completely fallen there.

It's just that what makes Ye Tian a little puzzled is that the Eternal Level powerhouses will not enter the Ultimate Demon Prison, maybe the opportunity of the Ultimate Demon Prison is not very attractive to the Eternal Level Powerhouses, but it is also very good for the juniors!

"There are a lot of opportunities for the Ultimate Demon Hell, but it is also a meat grinder, this time I'm afraid that a lot of Ultimate Realm Masters will fall there!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he will definitely go.

......

Gradually, the news of the opening of the Ultimate Hell spread throughout the Ultimate Land.

All of a sudden, many powerhouses in the Ultimate Land were ready to move.

The ultimate hell.

Many strong people have come here, waiting for the ultimate hell to open.

From the outside, the Ultimate Demon Hell is a seemingly boundless huge black curtain, but when it is not opened, even an eternal-level powerhouse cannot tear this black curtain.

It is said that this shady curtain is the formation of the rules of the Ultimate Land, and only the Ultimate Supreme can easily tear it apart.

And this time is the case, those eternal-level powerhouses have already made means to break through this black curtain at any time.

this day.

It's time for the Ultimate Hell to begin.

Rumble!!!

The dark curtain of the Ultimate Demon Hell was torn open by an invisible force, forming a huge gap.

Whew!!!!

Many strong people have entered it.

After those powerhouses of the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord entered, those high-level Ultimate Realm Masters dared to enter, their purpose was not to go into the depths of the Ultimate Demon Prison, it was too dangerous there, and they were looking for death when they went.

Their purpose is just to find some ultimate breath to comprehend on the edge of the ultimate hell, and if they can get lucky enough to comprehend the ultimate rules, it will be the biggest gain.

......

Ye Tian entered the Ultimate Demon Hell for the first time, and as soon as he entered, he felt the aura of the Ultimate Hell Demon, and the deeper he went, the stronger this aura became.

These breaths could barely fight hard, constantly penetrating into his body.

At first, it didn't feel anything.

According to his understanding, if he stays here for too long, he will be demonized by the breath of the Ultimate Demon Prison and become the ultimate demon disciple of the Ultimate Demon Prison.

But the Ultimate Demon Disciples almost always stay in the depths of the Ultimate Demon Prison, and as long as they don't go deeper, they are unlikely to encounter the Ultimate Demon Disciples.

However, if the Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters didn't go deeper, then there would be no point in coming in, and the opportunities on the periphery would not attract them.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and soon went deep into the ultimate demon hell.

Rumble!!!!!

A dark figure, an ancient-level ultimate demon disciple who exuded the aura of a demon hell all over his body, appeared, and attacked with a spear in his hand.

Ye Tian immediately fought back and fought with him.

But the strength of the other party is not strong, that is, the strength of the initial entry into the ancient level, and Ye Tian's strength is much more powerful than the ordinary ancient level.

Soon, he crushed his opponent.
